use_codes.desc: INDICATED FOR THE TREATMENT OF SPASTICITY RESULTING FROM MULTIPLE SCLEROSIS

indications.text:
FLEQSUVY is indicated for the treatment of spasticity resulting from multiple sclerosis,
particularly for the relief of flexor spasms and concomitant pain, clonus, and muscular rigidity.
FLEQSUVY may also be of some value in patients with spinal cord injuries and other spinal
cord diseases.
Limitati...
